Voter Registration Application In accordance with the reporting requirements of Act 88 of 2022, Forest County received a total of 163 mail-in absentee ballots by 8pm on the day of the May 19, 2026, Primary Election. Absentee, Mail-in and Voter Registration Applications MUST be printed, signed and the original sent or brought into the office, or you may apply online by clicking on Department of State at the bottom of this page. Mail in Ballot Application Absentee Ballot Application Election Results are found below.
